languages.text: "Нонсенс. Я бы запомнил, если бы в моем дворце..." {n}Неожиданно Себериан останавливается. Он внимательно всматривается в вас, прежде чем заговорить. В искаженном воксом голосе сквозит растерянность.{/n} "Подождите. Пожалуй... пожалуй, я видел вас раньше. Слышал о вас".

"Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."
languages.original_text: "Нонсенс. Я бы запомнил, если бы в моем дворце..." {n}Неожиданно Себериан останавливается. Он внимательно всматривается в вас, прежде чем заговорить. В искаженном воксом голосе сквозит растерянность.{/n} "Подождите. Пожалуй... пожалуй, я видел вас раньше. Слышал о вас".

traits.locale_text: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

"Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

"Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

languages.text: “胡说八道。若是如此，我定会记得——”{n}塞贝里安突然停住。他凝神端详了你一会儿，才再度开口。那因音阵而失真的声音里透着困惑：{/n}“且慢。或许……或许我确实见过你。又或者听说过你。”
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

traits.locale_text: “胡说八道。若是如此，我定会记得——”{n}塞贝里安突然停住。他凝神端详了你一会儿，才再度开口。那因音阵而失真的声音里透着困惑：{/n}“且慢。或许……或许我确实见过你。又或者听说过你。”

languages.text: « Balivernes. Je m'en souviendrais si... » {n}Seberian s'interrompt brutalement et vous dévisage longuement avant de reprendre la parole. Sa voix déformée par le vox trahit une certaine confusion :{/n} « Un petit instant... Peut-être... peut-être bien que je vous ai déjà {mf|vu|vue}. Ou que j'ai entendu parler de vous. »
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

traits.locale_text: « Balivernes. Je m'en souviendrais si... » {n}Seberian s'interrompt brutalement et vous dévisage longuement avant de reprendre la parole. Sa voix déformée par le vox trahit une certaine confusion :{/n} « Un petit instant... Peut-être... peut-être bien que je vous ai déjà {mf|vu|vue}. Ou que j'ai entendu parler de vous. »

languages.text: "Saçmalık. Seni her hâlükârda hatırlardım. Sen..." {n}Seberian aniden duruyor. Tekrar konuşmadan önce seni iyice süzüyor. Voksla bozulmuş sesinde çınlayan kafa karışıklığını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Dur biraz. Bir ihtimal... Bir ihtimal seni daha önce görmüş olabilirim. Ya da hakkında bir şeyler işitmiş olabilirim."
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

traits.locale_text: "Saçmalık. Seni her hâlükârda hatırlardım. Sen..." {n}Seberian aniden duruyor. Tekrar konuşmadan önce seni iyice süzüyor. Voksla bozulmuş sesinde çınlayan kafa karışıklığını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Dur biraz. Bir ihtimal... Bir ihtimal seni daha önce görmüş olabilirim. Ya da hakkında bir şeyler işitmiş olabilirim."

languages.text: «Tonterías. Me acordaría si le...». {n}Seberian se detiene repentinamente. Te mira fijamente antes de volver a hablar, y cuando lo hace la confusión en su voz es palpable pese a la distorsión del voco:{/n} «Un momento. Tal vez... sí le haya visto antes. O haya oído hablar de usted».
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

traits.locale_text: «Tonterías. Me acordaría si le...». {n}Seberian se detiene repentinamente. Te mira fijamente antes de volver a hablar, y cuando lo hace la confusión en su voz es palpable pese a la distorsión del voco:{/n} «Un momento. Tal vez... sí le haya visto antes. O haya oído hablar de usted».

languages.text: "Unsinn. Ich würde mich erinnern, wenn ich ..." {n}Seberian hält plötzlich inne. Er mustert dich eindringlich, ehe er fortfährt. Seine verzerrte Stimme klingt verwirrt.{/n} "Wartet einen Moment. Vielleicht ... habe ich Euch schon gesehen. Oder von Euch gehört."
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

traits.locale_text: "Unsinn. Ich würde mich erinnern, wenn ich ..." {n}Seberian hält plötzlich inne. Er mustert dich eindringlich, ehe er fortfährt. Seine verzerrte Stimme klingt verwirrt.{/n} "Wartet einen Moment. Vielleicht ... habe ich Euch schon gesehen. Oder von Euch gehört."

languages.text: 「そんなことないよ。もし私が―」{n}シベリアは突然止まり、あなたをじっと見つめたあと、再び話します。彼のボイスディストーションが歪んだ声は混乱を招きます。{/n}「ちょっと待って。もしかしたら…もしかしたら、前にあなたを見たことがあるかもしれない。あるいは、聞いたことがあるかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."

traits.locale_text: 「そんなことないよ。もし私が―」{n}シベリアは突然止まり、あなたをじっと見つめたあと、再び話します。彼のボイスディストーションが歪んだ声は混乱を招きます。{/n}「ちょっと待って。もしかしたら…もしかしたら、前にあなたを見たことがあるかもしれない。あるいは、聞いたことがあるかもしれない。」
